content: Account ORFLIE GERAL (4102226916661284) uses FB_MARKETING_API_TOKEN in .env. Amount_spent must be divided by 100 to get BRL value.
Core baseline CTR is 2.31%. Videos focus on CLT vs Outsource costs and Management risk of 'Star Sellers'. Target CPL is below R$ 50-70 for lead forms.
To avoid 'pirate' leads (low quality/unqualified), use Higher Intent Lead Forms with mandatory questions about Job Role and Company Size.
